title: Stripe Subscriptions
creator: Agent Buildprint
summary: A guarded Capability Buildprint for adding Stripe Checkout subscriptions, signed webhook handling, and persisted entitlement checks to compatible apps.
promise: Gives coding agents a phased implementation contract for grafting subscription billing into an existing app without guessing around auth, database, routes, or verification.
risks: Requires host app user identity and persistence
Sandbox proof requires Stripe test keys and webhook delivery
Existing billing providers require an explicit migration decision
Provider API details must be checked against current Stripe docs during implementation
checks: Verify webhook signatures before trusting events
Persist entitlement state before claiming paid access
Write capability receipt with proof level and blockers

trustBadges.label: Guarded capability
trustBadges.detail: Uses phased host assessment, planning, implementation, verification, and receipt.

trustBadges.label: Billing risk declared
trustBadges.detail: Explicitly treats Stripe subscriptions as high-risk billing and entitlement work.

publicStatus.label: Dogfood draft
publicStatus.explanation: Ready for agent dogfooding against a small compatible host app. Not yet runtime-verified against a real Stripe sandbox host.

whatYouGet: A bounded subscription billing implementation contract
whatYouNeed: A compatible app with user identity
A persistence layer or approved persistence choice
Stripe sandbox keys for runtime proof

howToUse.title: Load the packet
howToUse.detail: Use the package manifest and read BUILDPRINT.md first.

howToUse.title: Plan and graft
howToUse.detail: Write .buildprint/capability-plan.md, then implement each phase in order.

howToUse.title: Verify honestly
howToUse.detail: Run available checks and record the actual proof level in .buildprint/capability-receipt.md.

resultChecklist: Receipt records proof level and blockers
